verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Prefer official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence when accessible; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Fetched successfully. The public game page identifies Shadowrise Devs and says to join the community server for exclusive reward codes, but it does not expose current code strings in accessible HTML. Not used as direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Fetched successfully but only exposed the Discord JavaScript app shell in public web access. Code-list/game-announcements messages were not accessible, so Discord was not used as direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board and public board JSON
sources.notes: The board/JSON was accessible. The Actives Codes card still lists stale codes such as 30KCCU, UPD5, 7.5KFOLLOWTY, 10KFOLLOWTY, 12.5KFOLLOWTY, ROGUE, and SORRYFORISSUEANDRESTART, so Trello was not used as current active proof.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 27, 2026 with May 25 Ghoul Update notes. It lists 10 active codes: the two May 25 additions, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG and older predecessor codes inactive, and says new codes are posted in the official Discord game-announcements channel.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Last updated May 27, 2026. It lists 10 active codes: the two May 25 additions, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS. It lists level 12,500 for the two May 25 additions and restart/content codes, level 7,500 for GHOULUPDATE/MASTERY/RAIDS, and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG as expired.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: June 2026 page lists 11 active codes: the two May 25 additions, all three restart-bug variants, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS. It lists older predecessor codes such as 700KFAVSTY, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1/2, 1B100MVISITS, 1B200MVISITS, and 1B300MVISITS as expired.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Page title is June 2026 and the article says it checked for new Sailor Piece codes on June 1, 2026. It lists the 11 retained active codes with exact rewards, but also still lists older predecessor codes as active, creating stale-listing conflict. It says codes arrive in the official Discord code-list channel.

sources.name: Dexerto Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 26, 2026 to add two new codes. It lists 21 active codes, including the 11 codes retained here, and gives exact reward bundles for the two newest codes and most retained codes. It still lists older predecessor codes as active, so it was treated as reward support and active-state support but not strong expiry evidence. It points readers to the official Discord server for more codes.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated Jun 1, 2026. It lists 7 latest codes: the two May 25 additions, all three restart-bug variants, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and FREECODEFORYALL. It omits SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS, and has reward conflicts for the two May 25 additions. Treated as current support for the 7 visible codes and conflict/omission evidence for the rest.

sources.name: PC Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Last updated May 29, 2026 with a June 2026 title. It lists only 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM and FREECODEFORYALLL2 as active, with exact rewards matching the stored bundles. Treated as strong support for the two May 25 additions and omission conflict for the rest, not official expiry proof.

sources.name: Pocket Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 1, 2026 and says a new code was added. It lists the two May 25 additions plus SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS as active, but omits SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG and still lists older predecessor codes as active.

sources.name: Game.guide Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Local curl received HTTP 403, but web search/rendered access showed the page last updated June 1, 2026 and reporting 2 active codes: SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2 and SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3. Treated as current conflict evidence, but not enough by itself to expire other codes without official proof.

decisions.reason: Kept active because Beebom June 1, Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Dexerto, PCGamesN, PC Gamer, Pocket Gamer, and Game.guide all support it as current/recent. Stored reward bundle remains supported by Beebom, Dexerto, and PC Gamer; level 12500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active because Beebom June 1, Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Dexerto, PCGamesN, PC Gamer, Pocket Gamer, and Game.guide all support it as current/recent. Stored reward bundle remains supported by Beebom, Dexerto, Game.guide, and PC Gamer; level 12500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active because Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Beebom, Dexerto, PCGamesN, Pocket Gamer, and Game.guide list/include it active/current. PC Gamer omission is a conflict but not direct expiry evidence. Level 12500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active because Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Beebom, Dexerto, PCGamesN, Pocket Gamer, and Game.guide list/include it active/current. PC Gamer omission is a conflict but not direct expiry evidence. Level 12500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active with conflict. Destructoid, Beebom, Dexerto, and PCGamesN list it active/current. Pro Game Guides lists it inactive, GamesRadar lists it expired, Game.guide only lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2/3 active, Pocket Gamer omits it, and PC Gamer only lists the two May 25 additions. No official expiry proof was accessible.

Kept active because Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Beebom, Dexerto, PCGamesN, and Pocket Gamer list it active/current. Game.guide and PC Gamer omit it, but omission is not enough to expire it without official proof. Level 12500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active because Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Beebom, Dexerto, PCGamesN, and Pocket Gamer list it active/current. Game.guide and PC Gamer omit it, but omission is not enough to expire it without official proof. Level 12500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active with conflict. Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Beebom, Dexerto, and Pocket Gamer list it active/current, while PCGamesN, PC Gamer, and Game.guide omit it. Active evidence still outweighs omission/expiry evidence without official proof. Level 12500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active with conflict. Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Beebom, Dexerto, and Pocket Gamer list it active/current, while PCGamesN, PC Gamer, and Game.guide omit it. Active evidence still outweighs omission/expiry evidence without official proof. Level 7500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active with conflict. Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Beebom, Dexerto, and Pocket Gamer list it active/current, while PCGamesN, PC Gamer, and Game.guide omit it. Beebom supports the stored reward bundle; Dexerto conflicts with a raid-key bundle. Level 7500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active because Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Beebom, Dexerto, and Pocket Gamer list it active/current. PCGamesN, PC Gamer, and Game.guide omit it, but none supplied direct official expiry proof. Level 7500 remains based on GamesRadar.

No active code had strong enough official or cross-source expiry evidence to move today. PC Gamer/Game.guide/PCGamesN omissions strengthened conflicts, but Destructoid June page plus Beebom June 1 and several other current/recent sources still support the retained set. Older predecessor codes stayed expired because several current/recent sources list or imply expiry while Beebom, Dexerto, and Pocket Gamer show stale active-list behavior.

No source surfaced a new code beyond the May 25 additions already present in codes.json. Beebom says checked June 1 and Pocket Gamer says a new code was added, but their visible active lists did not show a new code beyond the existing retained set and stale predecessor codes.

source_conflicts.conflict: Destructoid, Beebom, Dexerto, and PCGamesN list it active/current. Pro Game Guides lists it inactive, GamesRadar lists it expired, Game.guide only lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2/3 active, Pocket Gamer omits it, and PC Gamer only lists the two May 25 additions.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or another strong current source joins explicit expired evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN updated Jun 1 omits these codes, PC Gamer lists only the two May 25 additions, and Game.guide reports only SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2/3 active. Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Beebom, Dexerto, and Pocket Gamer still list these codes active/current.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep active until official evidence or stronger current-source expiry agreement appears.

source_conflicts.conflict: 700KFAVSTY, FREECODEHERE1, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1, DELAYCODENR2, 1B100MVISITS, 1B200MVISITS, 1B300MVISITS, 1M100KLIKESTYYY, and TYSMFOR400KFOLLOWONEVENT remain split. Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, PCGamesN, PC Gamer, GamesRadar, and Game.guide support expiry/omission more strongly than Beebom, Dexerto, and Pocket Gamer stale active listings.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not restore unless official evidence appears or active-source agreement becomes stronger than the stale-listing pattern.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom supports the stored no-raid-key bundle, while Dexerto lists a raid-key bundle with fewer bloodline stones. Current Destructoid, Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Pocket Gamer only say free rewards or provide no exact bundle.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep the stored exact bundle until official evidence or stronger exact-source agreement confirms a different reward.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom, Dexerto, PC Gamer, and Game.guide support the stored newer-code bundles, while PCGamesN swaps or reduces the two May 25 reward bundles.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep stored bundles because more exact sources support them.

source_conflicts.conflict: GamesRadar still gives explicit per-code requirements: 12,500 for the two May 25 additions and restart/content codes, and 7,500 for GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. No newer official level-gate source was accessible.
source_conflicts.next_step: Use explicit per-code level rows unless official evidence or a newer source provides more specific requirements.
